items.title: Faker named Youth Cyber Gambling Awareness Ambassador by Korean National Police Agency
items.content_text: Faker will front a nationwide campaign in South Korea, encouraging young people struggling with cyber gambling to seek help.

items.title: BlizzCon 2026 bundles bring new skins, mounts, and more to your favorite Blizzard games
items.content_text: Here's everything to know about the BlizzCon Ultimate Collection and new digital bundles! We also go over what to expect at BlizzCon 2026 itself.

items.title: MSC 2026 Esports World Cup: Format, schedule, results, and more
items.content_text: Here is a complete guide to MSC 2026 at the Esports World Cup, including match results, schedules, and key information.

items.title: Single-player games deserve more attention in esports
items.content_text: League of Legends and Counter-Strike 2 seem to get all the love, but single-player games deserve way more attention.

items.title: I am not convinced that hunting for AI is going to solve esports' biggest issues
items.content_text: With Mobile Legends: Bang Bang recently accused of having AI in its menu, I got to thinking: Who cares really? Is it impacting esports?

items.title: Overwatch reveals Shion's original face and Hashimoto elders in new story
items.content_text: Overwatch's new Shion short story titled "Ambush" revealed Shion's original omnic form plus the names and personalities of the Hashimoto elders.

items.title: MLBB backtracks after fans outrage over AI-generated main menu in advanced server
items.content_text: Fans are upset about the recent MLBB Advanced Server update that adds a 3D model of Layla that seems to be generated by AI.

items.title: Saudia unveils esports-branded plane for EWC 2026's Paris debut
items.content_text: Saudia's expanded deal with the Esports Foundation includes a specially branded plane flying daily between Riyadh and Paris for the duration of EWC 2026.

items.title: BLG Bin to take a temporary break amid health concerns
items.content_text: Due to health concerns, BLG top laner Bin will be taking a break from competitive League of Legends ahead of LPL Split 3.

items.title: Team Vitality signs BYD as official vehicle partner for summer 2026
items.content_text: BYD France and Team Vitality have confirmed a new vehicle supply deal covering rosters across Rocket League, Tekken 8, Teamfight Tactics, and several other titles for the summer period.

items.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves has an insane DLC schedule, but it may not be enough to bring the sauce
items.content_text: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves devs are going ham with the DLC, dropping tons of characters. But do they have the sauce?

items.title: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows yet after PlayTime's scandal at the Esports World Cup
items.content_text: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.

items.title: The FGC has become too serious and we need more people like Hayao
items.content_text: The FGC has been real serious recently, and we need more whimsy, even if it comes in the form of a shocking tweet from Hayao.

items.title: Is Counter-Strike 2 going soft? Esports fans react to new comms rule and debate hate speech vs. trash talk
items.content_text: A newly-added rule states that what you say to your own teammates is no longer off-limits to TOs. Will this stop trash talking?

items.title: Esports has an excellent opportunity to cash in on nostalgia right now
items.content_text: Nostalgia within the gaming industry is a surefire way for developers and publishers to generate huge profits.
